title: botrychium simplex var. simplicissimum
intro: Botrychium simplex var. simplicissimum, also known as the Least Adder's-melon, is a rare and unique species of fern that belongs to the family Ophioglossaceae. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress and improving cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Botrychium simplex var. simplicissimum include infusions, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, capsules, and topical creams.
